name: journal_sidecar_leftover
description: The workspace includes a leftover SQLite rollback journal sidecar from an interrupted writer or external filesystem interruption.
source_hint: Covers the interrupted atomic write / external filesystem interference branch from beads_rust-rsei.3.3.
notes: The database and JSONL content are otherwise healthy so the fixture isolates the stale rollback journal signal.
Current posture is tolerated as clean by doctor; the fixture documents that behavior as an explicit replay contract.
